name: Basil-Parmesan Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh basil leaves, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour and Parmesan cheese.
3. Add basil leaves, garlic powder, onion powder, and black pepper; mix until combined.
4. Pour in buttermilk and stir with a fork until just mixed.
5. Shape the dough into a round and place on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
6. Brush the top of the scones with additional buttermilk.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Reduce baking time by about 2 minutes if using smaller cutters to create appetizers.
9. Allow scones to cool on a wire rack before serving.
